name: Snow Riders
author: Poki
description: Snow Riders is a cool and fast-paced racing game where you dive into thrilling ski competitions! Gear up, strap on your ski boots, and race downhill against other riders while dodging obstacles and collecting gems along the way. Use your rewards to upgrade your equipment and unlock new levels and snowy maps. Ready to carve the slopes and become the ultimate snow racer? How to play Snow Riders? Use A/D, the left/right arrow keys or the joystick to turn. Who created Snow Riders? Snow Riders is created by Sleepless Games. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Snow Riders for free? You can play Snow Riders for free on Poki. Can I play Snow Riders on mobile devices and desktop? Snow Riders can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
